questionHtml: Given that the equilibrium point at (800, 600) is a saddle point, sketch the phase portrait for x ≥ 0 , y ≥ 0 on the same axes used in part (e).
markschemeHtml:
A1A1

Note: Award A1 for a trajectory beginning close to (0, 0) and going to (0, 3000) and A1 for a trajectory beginning close to (0, 0) and going to (2000, 0) in approximately the correct places.

[2 marks]

meta.title: Given that the equilibrium point at (800, 600) is a saddle point, sketch the phase portrait for x ≥ 0 , y ≥ 0 on the same axes used in part (e).
